description: Plan and batch-generate the standard market-research-report visual set (market growth trajectory, TAM/SAM/SOM, Porter's Five Forces, competitive positioning, risk heatmap, executive infographic, plus an extended set) for a given market TOPIC, writing a manifest of every visual under record_store.
rules: read-only / local — never mutates a remote or live service
TOPIC is required; ALL=1 selects the full extended visual set (else core 5-6)
renders via the scientific-schematics + generate-image backends when present; degrades to a deterministic plan manifest when they are absent
usage: Set TOPIC (the market name); optionally set ALL=1 for the extended set. Output: market_visuals_manifest.txt.
limitation: Actual image rendering requires the scientific-schematics and generate-image skill scripts (heavy image/network backends) to be reachable on the skills path. Offline the porter records the deterministic plan only. The upstream --all path has a malformed visual entry that aborts the full enumeration partway; the core set always enumerates cleanly.
